problem: Health plans struggle with data silos that prevent automation, accurate payment processing, informed decision-making, and enhanced member care, limiting their ability to evolve from payers to true partners in care.
solution: HealthEdge provides integrated SaaS solutions for health plans enabling touchless transaction processing, prospective payment accuracy, care integrity, and AI-driven business intelligence, positioned as a Major Player in IDC MarketScape for U.S. value-based healthcare analytics and Best in KLAS for pre-payment accuracy.
